Demo.initialMessage: Hi there. I'm reaching out about an open balance of CAD 1,250 with Atlas Services. I have some flexible options that could work for you -- would you like to hear them?
Demo.replyDispute: I understand your concern. In this demo account, clause 4.2 of the service agreement requires 30-day written notice. I can note this for review, but in the meantime, would you like to explore a settlement option that could save you up to 30%?
Demo.replyPlan: Absolutely. For your balance of CAD 1,250, I can set up 3 monthly payments of $416.67. Each payment is processed securely through Stripe, and you'll get a receipt after each one. Would that work for you?
Demo.replyPay: Great decision. I'll send you a secure payment link right now. You can choose to pay the full amount, take the settlement offer at $875, or start a 3-month plan. Everything goes through Stripe checkout.
Demo.replyTime: I hear you, and I appreciate you being upfront about that. That's exactly why we have flexible options. Would a payment plan of $416.67/month over 3 months be more manageable for your situation?
Demo.replyWho: I'm the resolution assistant for this account. Everything here is confidential and secure. I'm here to help find an option that works for both sides. Would you like to see what's available?
Demo.replyDefault: Thanks for reaching out. I have a few options that might work for your situation: full payment, a 30% settlement discount, or a 3-month plan. Which would you like to hear more about?
Demo.inputPlaceholder: Type anything to test the agent
Demo.quickPlan: Can I set up a plan?
Demo.merchantViewHint: What you see while the AI works
Demo.metaDesc: Try the AI debt recovery agent in real time. See how Dragun negotiates with empathy and cites your contract.

Home.heroParagraph: Dragun negotiates with customers like a human, cites your contract when needed, and sends settlement links instantly, so you recover faster while staying compliant.
Home.chatBubble1: I understand this is frustrating. Your agreement requires 30 days written notice, so the January balance remains valid.
Home.chatBubble2: Can we split it in two payments this week?
Home.chatBubble3: Yes. I can send one payment link now and schedule the second for Friday.
Home.legalDesc: Built-in communication safeguards and escalation paths. Merchants remain responsible for local legal compliance.
Home.stripeDesc: Offer payment plans and secure links directly in chat, routed through Stripe Connect.
Home.knowledgeDesc: Index your exact terms so the agent stays consistent and cites the right clauses.
Home.howStep1Desc: Connect Stripe Connect (or your payment stack) and set your collection rules.
Home.howStep2Desc: Upload contracts, policies, and approved language so every response stays grounded.
Home.howStep3Desc: Run reminders, negotiation, settlement links, and receipts automatically 24/7.
Home.collectorsDesc: Standardize recovery workflows while protecting staff time and compliance posture.
Home.debtorsDesc: Give debtors a clear path to resolution with flexible options and clear documentation.
Home.ctaSubtitle: Launch a pilot in under an hour and keep your team focused on exceptions, not chasing.
Home.trustLine: Works with Stripe Connect · Audit-ready logs · Secure document indexing

Home.socialProof: Trusted by modern merchants in fitness, services, and local commerce.
Home.securityPoint1: Encryption in transit and at rest
Home.securityPoint2: Role-based access and secure admin paths

Pricing.title: Simple,
Pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business scale.
Pricing.heroDesc: Performance-based model. You only pay the recovery fee when funds are actually collected. No recovery, no fee.
Pricing.feeModelDesc: Dragun operates on a 5% platform fee applied only to successfully recovered funds processed through Stripe Connect. Monthly subscription covers platform access, AI compute, and support. No hidden fees. No long-term contracts. Cancel anytime.
Pricing.customPlanDesc: For portfolios exceeding 1,000 accounts, white-label requirements, or specific compliance needs.

FAQ.title: Common
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the dragon behind the debt.
FAQ.q1: How does the AI handle disputes?
FAQ.a1: Dragun uses Gemini 2.0 Flash to understand the debtor's context. If they claim they've already paid or cancelled, the AI will search your uploaded contracts and payment history to provide a factual, empathetic response.
FAQ.a2: Yes. Dragun operates within the guidelines of debt collection practices, acting as an automated agent of your business. It maintains a professional and firm but fair tone at all times.
FAQ.a3: Absolutely. Through your dashboard, you can adjust a slider from 'Soft Nudge' to 'Legal Firm' to match your brand's voice and urgency.
FAQ.a4: We integrate directly with Stripe, allowing debtors to pay via Credit Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or ACH transfers directly in the chat.

About.title: Our
About.paragraph: At Dragun.app, we believe debt recovery doesn’t have to be a battle. As a product of Meziani AI, we combine sub-second intelligence with an empathetic approach to help businesses recover lost revenue.
About.speedDesc: Leveraging the specialized Meziani AI engine to ensure every recovery interaction is instant and effective.
About.foundedDesc: Meziani AI created Dragun.app to be more than just a chatbot—it’s an agent of resolution.

Legal.title: Legal
Legal.subtitle: Last Updated: February 20, 2026. Trust, transparency, and the pursuit of compliance.
Legal.privacyContent: At Dragun.app, operated by Meziani AI, we prioritize the protection of your data and that of your debtors. We collect minimal information required for debt recovery services, including contact details, contract data, and payment metadata. We use trusted third parties including Supabase (data hosting), Vercel (infrastructure), Stripe (payments), Sentry (error monitoring), and Google services for analytics or AI. Data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We retain data for as long as needed to provide the service and meet legal obligations, with retention timelines to be defined. You can request access, correction, or deletion of your data by contacting our Privacy Officer at [privacy@meziani.ai]. If a breach affecting your data occurs, we will notify impacted parties consistent with applicable law. By using our platform, you acknowledge that Meziani AI acts as a data processor on behalf of our merchant clients.
Legal.tosContent: By accessing Dragun.app, you agree to the terms provided by Meziani AI (the legal entity to be specified). We provide an AI-powered negotiation interface for debt recovery. You are responsible for the accuracy of any contract data or debtor information uploaded to the platform. Meziani AI is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice. Acceptable use prohibits harassment, abusive communications, or prohibited uses of the platform. We limit liability to the maximum extent permitted by law and exclude indirect damages. The service is governed by the laws of Quebec and applicable federal laws of Canada. Merchants must ensure they hold any required collection licenses or authorizations for their jurisdiction. Your use of the service constitutes acceptance of these evolving terms.
Legal.complianceContent: Meziani AI designs Dragun.app with the aim of following standard debt collection rules (including FDCPA guidelines). However, because debt collection laws vary significantly by jurisdiction, merchants are solely responsible for ensuring that their specific configuration of the AI (including the 'strictness level') and any settlement offers made through the platform are fully compliant with their local laws and regulations. We aim for transparency in all AI-driven interactions.
